choose_language_desc: Kōwhiria tō reo e hiahia ana
tagline: Wheako i te taumata kāore anō kia kitea
verify_email_desc: Whakauruhia te waehere mati 6 i tukuna ki
didnt_receive_code: Kāore i whiwhi i te waehere?
forgot_password_desc: Whakauruhia tō wāhitau īmēra ka tukuna e mātou he waehere whakaū ki a koe hei tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa.
reset_password_desc: Waihangahia he kupuhipa hou mō tō pūkete.
something_went_wrong: I hapa tētahi mea. Ngana anō.
login_tagline:
Aroturukihia tō āhua me te hono anō
ki tō hapori
welcome_tagline:
Aroturukihia tō āhua me te hono
ki ngā tāngata whakaaro ōrite
your_posts_appear_here: Ka puta ō panui ki konei
saved_posts_appear_here: Ka puta ngā panui ka tiakina e koe ki konei
max_interests_allowed: Te mōrahi 10 ngā hiahia e whakaaetia ana
could_not_load_feed: Kāore i taea te uta i te whāngai
be_first_to_share: Ko koe te tuatahi ki te tiri i tētahi mea
permission_media_photos: Tukua te urunga ki ō whakaahua i ngā Tautuhinga.
permission_media_videos: Tukua te urunga ki ō ataata i ngā Tautuhinga.
max_media_allowed: Te mōrahi {count} ngā kōnae pāpāho e whakaaetia ana
max_hashtags_allowed: Te mōrahi {count} ngā pātene e whakaaetia ana
link_copied: Kua tāruatia te hononga ki te papatopenga
no_following_yet: Kāore anō e whai ana i tētahi
mood_camera_subtitle: Tukua tō mata ki te kōrero
mood_camera_desc: Ka whakamahi a ENOM i tō kāmera mua ki te tātari i ngā āhuatanga kanohi me te kite i tō āhua o nāianei. Ka tukatukahia ō raraunga kanohi i runga i tō pūrere, kāore e rokirokitia, kāore e tiritirihia.
mood_camera_privacy: He mea nui tō tūmataiti — ka mahia ngā mahi katoa i runga i tō pūrere.
mood_camera_denied_desc: Kia kitea tō āhua, me whai urunga kāmera a ENOM. Pātōhia ki raro ki te ngana anō.
mood_camera_perm_denied_desc: Kua whakakāhoretia pūmautia te urunga kāmera. Whakahohea i ō tautuhinga pūrere kia whakamahia te kitea āhua.
mood_camera_restricted_desc: Kua herea te urunga kāmera i tēnei pūrere, tērā pea nā ngā mana whakahaere mātua. Tirohia ō tautuhinga pūrere.
mood_camera_initializing: E whakareri ana i te kāmera...
mood_scan_guide: Whakanohoia tō mata ki te porohita
mood_scan_analyzing: E tātari ana i tō āhua...
mood_scan_low_light: He iti te māramatanga — whakahohea te uira
mood_scan_error: Kāore i taea te kite i te āhua. Ngana anō.
mood_scan_no_face: Kāore i kitea he mata. Whakanohoia tō mata ki te pūtahi.
opening_camera: E whakatuwhera ana i te kāmera
mood_msg_happy: E whakaputa ana koe i te kaha pai! Kia mau tonu ki te tiri i ngā wairua pai.
mood_msg_calm: Kei te āhua mārie tō hinengaro. He wā pai mō te whakaaro.
mood_msg_sad: He pai te rongo i tēnei āhua. Tangohia he wā māu anō.
mood_msg_angry: Tangohia he manawa hōhonu. Whakaarohia he hīkoi poto, he whakaaro noa rānei.
mood_msg_surprised: I mau tō aro e tētahi mea! Kia noho kaiuiui.
mood_msg_neutral: Kei te tōkeke tō āhua. He hinengaro mārie, he hinengaro mārama.
mood_msg_default: Matawaia tō mata ki te kite i tō āhua o nāianei.
no_camera_available: Kāore he kāmera e wātea ana
select_your_mood: Kōwhiria te āhua e rongo ana koe
scan_to_start: Matawaia tō āhua ki te tīmata aroturuki
